title: knautia arvensis
intro: Knautia arvensis, also known as field scabious, is a flowering plant in the family Dipsacaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-bacterial and antioxidant properties. Knautia arvensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for its medicinal use, and it is often combined with other herbs for enhanced effects.
